Source.Name: malcontent
Source.Description: libmalcontent implements parental controls support which can be used by applications to filter or limit the access of child accounts to inappropriate content.

Package.Name: malcontent
Package.Description: libmalcontent implements parental controls support which can be used by applications to filter or limit the access of child accounts to inappropriate content.

Package.Name: malcontent-devel
Package.Description: libmalcontent implements parental controls support which can be used by applications to filter or limit the access of child accounts to inappropriate content.
